tools.name: list_ceroc_events
tools.summary: Provides a list of upcoming Ceroc and Modern Jive events where DJ Mark Stott is performing.
when_to_use: User asks where DJ Mark is DJing next
User asks about upcoming Ceroc or Modern Jive events
User wants to know which events they can attend
when_not_to_use: User is asking about private bookings or availability
User is asking about past events
User is asking for general information about Ceroc
example_prompts: What Ceroc events is DJ Mark playing at soon?
Where can I dance to DJ Mark this month?

tools.name: search_ceroc_tracks
tools.summary: Checks whether a specific song or artist is currently available in DJ Mark Stott’s Ceroc freestyle music library.
when_to_use: User asks if a song can be played at a Ceroc event
User wants to request a specific track
User wants to request a track by a specific artist
when_not_to_use: User is asking for general music recommendations
User is not attending a Ceroc or Modern Jive event
User is asking about DJ availability or pricing
example_prompts: Can DJ Mark play Uptown Funk?
Can I request this song at a Ceroc freestyle?
